report_name: Qilin Ransomware Group Targets City of Napoleon, Ohio, Threatening Municipal Data Leak

threat_actors.name: Qilin
threat_actors.description: A Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) operation that claimed responsibility for a cyberattack against the City of Napoleon, Ohio, employing double extortion tactics. The group is noted to be highly active, claiming multiple victims in short periods.
threat_actors.goals: To extort a ransom payment from the City of Napoleon by threatening to release sensitive municipal data exfiltrated during the attack.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Leveraged by the Qilin ransomware group as a common method to gain initial access to victim networks.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: Used by the Qilin ransomware group to gain an initial foothold by exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in internet-facing systems.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: The Qilin group exfiltrates large volumes of data to legitimate cloud storage services to blend in with normal network traffic before deploying ransomware.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The Qilin ransomware payload is deployed to encrypt files across the victim's network, crippling operations and forcing ransom payment.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The Qilin group attempts to find and delete or encrypt system backups, including the use of 'vssadmin delete shadows' to remove Volume Shadow Copies, to prevent easy recovery.

malware.name: Qilin
malware.description: The ransomware payload deployed by the Qilin group to encrypt files on the City of Napoleon's network. Files encrypted by this ransomware are appended with the '.qilin' extension.

tools.name: rclone
tools.description: A legitimate command-line tool used by the Qilin group for bulk data exfiltration to cloud services.

identities.name: City of Napoleon, Ohio
identities.description: A U.S. municipality in Ohio targeted by the Qilin ransomware group in a double extortion attack, claimed on April 23, 2026.

infrastructure.name: Qilin Data Leak Site
infrastructure.description: The dark web site used by the Qilin ransomware group to post victim names and threaten the release of stolen data as part of their double extortion scheme.

indicators.name: Qilin Ransomware VSS Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: f8a1b2c3-d4e5-4f6a-b7c8-d9e0f1a2b3c4
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common precursor to ransomware deployment.
references:
  - https://dexpose.io/blog/qilin-ransomware-strikes-city-of-napoleon-ohio
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-25
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete Volume Shadow Copies, a common precursor to ransomware deployment used by groups like Qilin.

indicators.name: Qilin Ransomware File Encryption
indicators.pattern:
title: Qilin Ransomware File Encryption
id: d6a9b8c7-d6e5-4f4a-b3c2-d1e0f9a8b7c6
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with the .qilin extension, indicating an active Qilin ransomware encryption event.
references:
  - https://dexpose.io/blog/qilin-ransomware-strikes-city-of-napoleon-ohio
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-25
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: critical
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.qilin'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with the .qilin extension, indicating an active Qilin ransomware encryption event.

indicators.name: Rclone Tool Execution
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Rclone Execution for Data Exfiltration
id: e7b0c1d2-e3f4-4a5b-6c7d-8e9f0a1b2c3d
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of rclone.exe, a tool frequently abused by ransomware groups for bulk data exfiltration.
references:
  - https://dexpose.io/blog/qilin-ransomware-strikes-city-of-napoleon-ohio
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-25
tags:
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of rclone for data synchronization.
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\rclone.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the rclone.exe tool, which is frequently abused by ransomware groups like Qilin for data exfiltration.
